title: ceramocarpium marginatum
intro: Ceramocarpium marginatum, also known as the 'Mountain Carrot', is a type of plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ceramocarpium marginatum include its ability to lower fever, alleviate cough, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, Ceramocarpium marginatum is often used in combination with other herbs to create teas, decoctions, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
